Home.message:
AtlasCrawl is an open-source app built specifically for **Bilkent University Information Office for Prospective Students**.

👈 Select a task from the menu on the left to either start an analysis on the existing data or crawl new data!

NewData.message:
This page allows you to crawl new data from the Council of Higher Education [website](https://yokatlas.yok.gov.tr/lisans-anasayfa.php)

 **Instructions 👇**
* Select the universities for which you want to run the data collection.
* Press start to crawl.
* You can download the crawled data from this page or use it in the analysis tab.

select_box.prompt: Do you want to only include specific universities? If the answer is yes, please check the box below and then select the universities in the new field.

NewData.multi_select: Select and deselect the universities you would like to include in the analysis. You can clear the current selection by clicking the corresponding x-button on the right

Analyze.hs_message:
## High School Analysis
This page lets you analyze the crawled placement data.

 **Instructions 👇**
* Select and load a dataset.
* Use filters to get subsets in the dataset.
	- Filters increase in restrictive power as you go from left to right.
* You can choose to plot aggregate distributions or distribution in specific scholarship categories using the checkboxes above the charts.
* All of the figures in this page are downloadable using the *...* icon.
* You can also view all of the figures in fullscreen for high resolution using ↔️ icon.

 **This page includes:**
- Top-K universities by total graduates
- Top-K departments by total graduates
- Distribution of university cities preferred by graduate students 
- Aggregate/Scholarship-specific distribution of department for specific university
- Aggregate/Scholarship-specific distribution of universities for specific departments
Analyze.message:
## University Analysis
This page lets you analyze the crawled placement data.

 **Instructions 👇**
* Select and load a dataset.
* Use filters to get subsets in the dataset.
	- Filters increase in restrictive power as you go from left to right.
* You can choose to plot aggregate distributions or distribution in specific scholarship categories using the checkboxes above the charts.
* All of the figures in this page are downloadable using the *...* icon.
* You can also view all of the figures in fullscreen for high resolution using ↔️ icon.

 **This page includes:**
- Top-K high schools by total graduates
- Top-K departments by total graduates
- Distribution of graduate student cities
- Aggregate/Scholarship-specific distribution of department for specific high schools
- Aggregate/Scholarship-specific Distribution of high schools for specific departments
Analyze.filter_prompt: In order to include all options, leave the filter blank
Analyze.top_hs_prompt: Investigate the placement statistics across high schools for the selected universities 👉
Analyze.top_uni_prompt: Investigate the placement statistics across universities for the selected high schools 👉
Analyze.top_hs_slider: Number of high schools to show
Analyze.top_hs_title: Top {} high schools by Total Graduates
Analyze.spec_hs_info: You can also investigate individual high schools by the departments preferred by the graduates
Analyze.spec_dept_info: You can also investigate individual departments by the high schools preferred by the graduates
Analyze.spec_uni_info: You can also investigate individual departments by the universities preferred by the graduates
Analyze.city_distribution: Distribution of graduates with respect to cities
